prompt: Create a computer graphic visualization for object detection, rendering the blue hoodie from image 1 using the intricate texture and atmospheric lighting style seen in image 2, suitable for dataset imagery.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics visualization suitable for object detection dataset imagery. The central subject should be the blue hoodie from image 1, re-rendered with the intricate, highly detailed surface texture and atmospheric warm glow lighting observed in image 2. Position the hoodie prominently against a dark, subtle background to emphasize the lighting and texture details.
objects: intricate, highly detailed surface texture (on the hoodie)
atmospheric warm glow lighting (on the hoodie)
